name: 禁用组件导入检查
description: 检查是否导入规范禁用的组件，禁止使用不符合要求的库

hooks.command: grep -n "import logging\|from logging import\|import argparse\|from argparse import" app/ --include="*.py" | grep -v "core/logger.py" | grep -v "cli/" | grep -v "__pycache__" | grep -v ".pyc" && echo "错误：发现禁用导入，请使用loguru替代原生logging，使用Typer替代argparse" && exit 1 || exit 0
